onde_voce_esta:
Onde você está: 
- The title 'Nature's Beauty' is appropriate and sets the theme for the essay.
de_um_passo_alem:
Dê um passo além: 
- Expand on the theme by providing more details and examples about nature's beauty and serenity.
- Include descriptive language and imagery to engage the reader and paint a vivid picture of nature.
justificativa.mensagem: Your title is a great start! To improve, try to elaborate more on your ideas and use descriptive language to make your essay more engaging. Keep up the good work!
